meaning: n.核子反应炉所产生的残热
examples: The energy saving work practice of utilizing afterheat of drained effluent of boilers is presented.
Presently, inorganic hot-pipe endothermic heat is the most advanced afterheat utilization technology all over the world.
Using heat exchanger to reclaim the afterheat of the industrial kiln fume can not only save fuel consumption but also improve the productivity of kilns.
